proposals.summary: Fallback proposal derived from objective, success criteria, constraints and out-of-scope notes and expanded into 5 task(s).

tasks.title: Clarify and scope the goal objective
acceptance: Objective: 检查当前 codex-auto 的安全性、健壮性、可用性与上手难度、扩展性，形成问题清单并逐项修复高优先级问题。

tasks.title: Implement the recorded success criteria
acceptance: Success criterion: 按安全性、健壮性、可用性与上手难度、扩展性输出问题清单
Success criterion: 修复高优先级安全或数据一致性问题
Success criterion: 修复高优先级健壮性或流程阻断问题
Success criterion: 改进至少一项可用性或上手难度问题
Success criterion: 所有改动通过 scripts/verify.ps1 与必要回归测试

tasks.title: Respect the recorded constraints
acceptance: Constraint: 只修改必要源文件和 autonomy/*，不触碰未公开 Codex 内部接口
Constraint: 保持 Windows 原生 PowerShell、本地 Git 与 background worktree 方案

tasks.title: Keep out-of-scope work out of the plan
acceptance: Out of scope: 不引入 GUI
Out of scope: 不接入私有 automation 存储

tasks.title: Verify the proposal before task materialization
acceptance: The proposal can be reviewed without writing tasks.json.
